title: Under the Lash
writer: Alice Askew, Claude Askew, Edward Knoblock
actors: Gloria Swanson, Mahlon Hamilton, Russell Simpson
plot: Deborah Krillet is the young wife of Simeon Krillet, a Boer farmer and religious fanatic. She falls in love with young Englishman Robert Waring, who comes to the farm as overseer. Krillet threatens to beat her for reading Shakespe...
